visual_narrative: Opens with a dramatic camera move on the Turia bike lane, then flows through the green corridor of Rio Turia showing tree-lined paths and people. Transitions to the hidden Jardin Real with its palm trees, passes the Palau de la Musica ramp, discovers parks with statues and greenery. A chair find on the sidewalk adds the street-find surprise. Closes with a calm park bench CTA scene and a palm-tree-lined ride-away.
